kubevirt.core.kubevirt_vm.description: Use the Kubernetes Python client to perform create or delete operations on KubeVirt VirtualMachines. Pass options to create the VirtualMachine as module arguments. Authenticate using either a config file, certificates, password or token. Supports check mode.

api_version.description: Use this to set the API version of KubeVirt.

name.description: Specify the name of the C(VirtualMachine). This option is ignored when O(state=present) is not set. Mutually exclusive with O(generate_name).

generate_name.description: Specify the basis of the C(VirtualMachine) name and random characters will be added automatically on the cluster to generate a unique name. Only used when O(state=present). Mutually exclusive with O(name).

namespace.description: Specify the namespace of the C(VirtualMachine).

annotations.description: Specify annotations to set on the C(VirtualMachine). Only used when O(state=present).

labels.description: Specify labels to set on the C(VirtualMachine).

running.description: Specify whether the C(VirtualMachine) should be running or not. Mutually exclusive with O(run_strategy). Defaults to O(running=yes) when O(running) and O(run_strategy) are not set.

run_strategy.description: Specify the C(RunStrategy) of the C(VirtualMachine). Mutually exclusive with O(running).

instancetype.description: Specify the C(Instancetype) matcher of the C(VirtualMachine). Only used when O(state=present).

preference.description: Specify the C(Preference) matcher of the C(VirtualMachine). Only used when O(state=present).

data_volume_templates.description: Specify the C(DataVolume) templates of the C(VirtualMachine). See U(https://kubevirt.io/api-reference/main/definitions.html#_v1_datavolumetemplatespec)

spec.description: Specify the template spec of the C(VirtualMachine). See U(https://kubevirt.io/api-reference/main/definitions.html#_v1_virtualmachineinstancespec)

wait.description: Whether to wait for the C(VirtualMachine) to end up in the ready state.

wait_sleep.description: Number of seconds to sleep between checks. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

wait_timeout.description: How long in seconds to wait for the resource to end up in the ready state. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

delete_options.description: Configure behavior when deleting an object. Only used when O(state=absent).

state.description: Determines if an object should be created, patched, or deleted. When set to O(state=present), an object will be created, if it does not already exist. If set to O(state=absent), an existing object will be deleted. If set to O(state=present), an existing object will be patched, if its attributes differ from those specified.

force.description: If set to O(force=yes), and O(state=present) is set, an existing object will be replaced.

hidden_fields.description: Hide fields matching this option in the result. An example might be O(hidden_fields=[metadata.managedFields]) or O(hidden_fields=[metadata.annotations[kubemacpool.io/transaction-timestamp]]).

kubevirt.core.kubevirt_vm_info.description: Use the Kubernetes Python client to perform read operations on KubeVirt C(VirtualMachines). Pass options to find C(VirtualMachines) as module arguments. Authenticate using either a config file, certificates, password or token. Supports check mode.

api_version.description: Use this to set the API version of KubeVirt.

name.description: Specify the name of the C(VirtualMachine).

label_selectors.description: List of label selectors to use to filter results.

field_selectors.description: List of field selectors to use to filter results.

running.description: Specify whether the C(VirtualMachine) should be running or not. This affects the ready condition to wait for. This requires O(wait=yes).

wait.description: Whether to wait for the C(VirtualMachine) to end up in the ready state. By default this is waiting for the C(VirtualMachine) to be up and running. Modify this behavior by setting O(running).

wait_sleep.description: Number of seconds to sleep between checks. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

wait_timeout.description: How long in seconds to wait for the resource to end up in the ready state. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

hidden_fields.description: Hide fields matching this option in the result. An example might be O(hidden_fields=[metadata.managedFields]) or O(hidden_fields=[metadata.annotations[kubemacpool.io/transaction-timestamp]]).

kubevirt.core.kubevirt_vmi_info.description: Use the Kubernetes Python client to perform read operations on KubeVirt C(VirtualMachineInstances). Pass options to find C(VirtualMachineInstances) as module arguments. Authenticate using either a config file, certificates, password or token. Supports check mode.

api_version.description: Use this to set the API version of KubeVirt.

name.description: Specify the name of the C(VirtualMachineInstance).

label_selectors.description: List of label selectors to use to filter results.

field_selectors.description: List of field selectors to use to filter results.

wait.description: Whether to wait for the C(VirtualMachineInstance) to end up in the ready state. By default this is waiting for the C(VirtualMachineInstance) to be up and running.

wait_sleep.description: Number of seconds to sleep between checks. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

wait_timeout.description: How long in seconds to wait for the resource to end up in the ready state. Ignored if O(wait) is not set.

hidden_fields.description: Hide fields matching this option in the result. An example might be O(hidden_fields=[metadata.managedFields]) or O(hidden_fields=[metadata.annotations[kubemacpool.io/transaction-timestamp]]).
